title: rubus × parceglandulosus
intro: Rubus × parceglandulosus, also known as hybrid raspberry or raspberry hybrid, is a genus of flowering plants that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × parceglandulosus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
